agents.name: ContentPilot AI
agents.description: Autonomous social media agent that creates, schedules, and optimizes content across Instagram, TikTok, and X. Learns your brand voice and adapts in real time.
agents.ourReview: We ran ContentPilot on a test Instagram account for 2 weeks. It nailed the posting schedule and the content quality was surprisingly good — about 80% of posts needed zero editing. The brand voice learning took about 3 days to really dial in. Best for businesses that already know their voice and just need scale.

agents.name: LeadHunter
agents.description: AI sales agent that finds qualified leads, enriches contact data, and sends personalized outreach sequences. Integrates with any CRM.
agents.ourReview: LeadHunter is impressive for lead gen. We pointed it at a niche market (local bakeries in Austin) and it found 200+ qualified leads with email addresses in under an hour. The outreach sequences are templated but customizable. The CRM integration worked seamlessly with HubSpot. Pricier than alternatives but the lead quality justifies it.

agents.name: ShopSense
agents.description: Ecommerce AI that handles customer service, product recommendations, and inventory alerts. Built for Shopify, WooCommerce, and Etsy.
agents.ourReview: ShopSense is the best ecommerce agent we've tested for small sellers. Setup on Shopify took 10 minutes. Within a day it was handling customer questions about shipping and returns with 90% accuracy. The inventory alerts saved our test store from two stockouts. The free tier for under 100 orders makes it a no-brainer to try.

agents.name: Lindy.ai
agents.description: Build custom AI sales workflows without code. Automate follow-ups, CRM updates, meeting scheduling, and pipeline management.
agents.ourReview: Lindy is the most flexible sales agent we've tested. It's not just one agent — it's a platform for building your own sales workflows. The no-code builder is genuinely easy (we built a lead follow-up workflow in 30 minutes). The free tier is generous enough to get real value before paying. Best for people who want customization over simplicity.

agents.name: Metricool AI
agents.description: All-in-one social media management with AI-powered content suggestions, optimal timing, hashtag research, and competitor analysis.
agents.ourReview: Metricool is the best value social media agent we've found. The free plan is surprisingly capable — you get scheduling, basic analytics, and AI content suggestions. The paid plans add competitor analysis and multi-platform analytics that are genuinely useful. Not as autonomous as ContentPilot (you still do more manual work) but much cheaper and more established.

agents.name: PriceBot Pro
agents.description: Dynamic pricing agent for ecommerce. Monitors competitors, adjusts your prices in real time, and maximizes margins automatically.
agents.ourReview: PriceBot Pro is powerful but we have mixed feelings. The competitor monitoring is excellent — it caught pricing changes within 15 minutes across 50+ competitors. The auto-pricing feature is scary-good but needs careful guardrails (we recommend setting min/max limits). Not verified yet because we need more time testing the revenue impact claims.

agents.name: ViralSpark
agents.description: TikTok and Reels specialist. Generates video scripts, suggests trending sounds, predicts virality, and auto-posts at peak times.
agents.ourReview: If you're focused on short-form video, ViralSpark is the one to try. The script generation is solid — it studies your niche and generates hooks that actually work. The virality prediction was right about 60% of the time (which sounds low but is way better than guessing). The auto-posting at peak times consistently outperformed our manual posting by 2-3x.

agents.name: DealFlow AI
agents.description: Enterprise-grade sales intelligence. Tracks buying signals, scores deals, predicts close rates, and coaches reps with AI suggestions.
agents.ourReview: DealFlow is the most sophisticated sales agent we've tested. The buying signal tracking is genuinely insightful — it flagged two deals in our test pipeline that were about to go cold before the sales team noticed. The AI coaching suggestions are useful for less experienced sellers. On the expensive side for solopreneurs, but worth it for teams of 3+.

agents.name: ReturnGuard
agents.description: Reduces ecommerce returns by 40%. AI analyzes purchase patterns, flags likely returns, and proactively engages customers post-purchase.
agents.ourReview: Interesting concept and early results look promising, but we haven't verified the 40% return reduction claim yet — that needs a longer test period. The post-purchase engagement emails are well-written and genuinely helpful (not spammy). The pattern detection flagged serial returners accurately. We'll update this review after 90 days of testing.
